description: Clubhouse showcase with image, stats grid, and CTA

fields.name: Subtitle
fields.default: Our clubhouse is literally inside a pirate ship.

fields.name: Body
fields.default: Duck under timber beams, peer through porthole windows, and belly up to a bar built into the hull. The Captain's Galley serves gourmet burgers, fish tacos, tropical smoothies, craft cocktails from the Grog Bar, and the legendary treasure chest dessert — a real chocolate chest filled with gold-dusted truffles.
